$comment: c104 (D-CSUBSET-INTRINSIC-ATOMIC-CAS): runtime witness for the _InterlockedCompareExchange atomic-CAS intrinsic (x86 `lock cmpxchg` implicit-RAX / arm64 LDAXR-STLXR retry loop as REAL CFG blocks). Three arms in one exit code: success (returns original 5, stores 9), failure (comparand mismatch: NO store, returns the OBSERVED 9), and an UNUSED-RESULT CAS whose store must still land (the hasSideEffects/DCE guard: dropping it shifts the exit by -12). The arm64 qemu arm is the cross-target RUNTIME closure for the LL/SC loop (encoding pins alone are not runtime proof); the `release` arm (shippedPipeline, zero-drift) proves DCE/CSE/LICM respect the side-effecting MIR AtomicCas through the full optimizer. exit = 5+9+9+23 = 46.
